description: This file defines the CalculatedThroughputEquationSetupController class, an ASP.NET Core API controller handling throughput calculation endpoints, including retrieval, upsert, and generation of throughput data for sites and input parameters.

classes.name: CalculatedThroughputEquationSetupController
classes.description: An ASP.NET Core API controller managing throughput calculation endpoints for sites and input parameters.

methods.name: GetForSite
methods.description: Retrieves calculated throughput inputs for a specified site and reporting year, optionally filtered by assetId.

methods.name: Manage
methods.description: Upserts throughput equation setups for a site and reporting year, used for copy replication.

methods.name: Generate
methods.description: Generates a throughput value for a given input parameter, returning a computed throughput.
